questions: Does status_json or Phase 175 already satisfy any part of #270?
Does every required snapshot field have a repository-local source?
Where does the schema publish under existing conventions?

findings.summary: status_json.py:78-105 exports verdict rows only; its in-process runner (:44-60) is the right internal engine for the snapshot's health section
governance_snapshot.py is Phase 175 DNA backup; zero overlap -- new module named snapshot_export to avoid collision

every required field has a repository-local source: pyproject, session marker, ledger tail/SEAL entries, gates dir, shadow JSONL, health findings, doc-currency; git config for repo id (local, optional)
schema publication: qor/gates/schema/ + SCHEMA_REGISTRY.json per the Phase 169 freeze rule; jsonschema dependency already present
fail-safe as structure: per-section state ok|unknown|error + source pointer; absence never renders healthy
